goal: Add a side-effect-free consume preflight builder that validates a runtime patch permit artifact is ready for later consumption while keeping permit consume, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, apply runtime patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, run runtime execution, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Issued runtime patch permit artifacts can be preflighted for later consumption without consuming them.
Consume ref, consumer ref, and consume policy ref are required.
Permit consume and runtime execution remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption, patch application, and execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing consume ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, runtime patch application, server mutation, route mutation, runtime execution, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-113 recorded a side-effect-free runtime patch permit artifact without consuming it.
